description: 8 mm OD precision-ground hardened linear shaft. Pairs with LM8UU bushings.
notes: Stock lengths typically 100–600 mm. For precision motion at ~200 mm+, consider linear rails (HGR15) instead.

description: T8 trapezoidal lead screw, 8 mm pitch x 8 mm lead (single start). One nut rotation = 8 mm linear travel.
notes: Anti-backlash nut is essential when the load reverses direction (e.g. CNC plunge). Plain brass nut is fine for one-direction lifts.

description: 15 mm HG-series linear rail. Profile rail is 15 mm wide, paired with HGH15CA standard-block carriage. Higher load + accuracy than LM8UU.
notes: Genuine Hiwin/THK rails are smoother + quieter than clones. Clones are 1/4 the price and adequate for most maker projects.

description: GT2 (2 mm pitch) timing belt, 6 mm wide. The 3D-printer-and-small-CNC standard.
notes: Pair with 16T or 20T GT2 pulleys (5 mm bore for NEMA 17 motors). Closed-loop lengths sold by mm, open-ended sold by meter.
